All Games

Browse all 39 brain training games. Search or filter by category.

Typing Test

Measure your typing speed in WPM. Test how fast and accurately you can type with our free online typing speed test. Track your progress over time.

⌨️
speed

Reaction Test

Test your visual reaction time. Click as fast as you can when the screen turns green. Compare your reaction speed with the average.

⚡
speed

Memory Test

Test your visual memory with our card matching game. Find all the matching pairs in as few moves as possible. Improve your memory skills.

🧠
memory

Number Memory

Test how many digits you can remember. Numbers get longer with each level. Challenge your short-term memory and see how far you can go.

🔢
memory

Color Test

Test your color perception skills. Match colors and identify subtle differences in hue. Find out how well you can distinguish between similar colors.

🎨
visual

Visual Memory

Test your visual memory by remembering the positions of highlighted tiles. Challenge your spatial memory and see how many levels you can complete.

👁️
memory

Sudoku

Play free Sudoku puzzles with three difficulty levels. Challenge your logical thinking and number placement skills. Perfect for brain training.

🧩
logic

Minesweeper

Play the classic Minesweeper game online. Clear the board without detonating any mines. Three difficulty levels available. Free and no download needed.

💣
logic

IQ Puzzle

Test your pattern recognition skills with IQ-style puzzles. Find the missing piece in visual matrices. Challenge your logical reasoning and abstract thinking.

🧩
logic

Math Challenge

Test your mental arithmetic speed. Solve addition, subtraction, and multiplication problems against the clock. Improve your math skills with daily practice.

🔢
math

Sequence Memory

Test your memory by remembering and repeating sequences. Watch the pattern, then click the tiles in the same order. How long can your sequence get?

🔁
memory

Aim Trainer

Test your clicking speed and accuracy. Hit targets as they appear on screen. Improve your hand-eye coordination and reaction time.

🎯
coordination

Chimp Test

Test your working memory like a chimpanzee. Numbers appear briefly on screen — click them in order after they disappear. How many can you remember?

🐵
memory

Verbal Memory

Test your verbal memory by identifying words you've seen before. See how many words you can remember. Challenge your recognition memory.

📝
word

Word Scramble

Unscramble jumbled letters to form words. Test your vocabulary and anagram skills. Each word comes with a hint to help you solve it.

🔤
word

Speed Math

Rapid-fire arithmetic challenge. Solve as many math problems as you can in 60 seconds. Addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division.

⚡
math

Word Search

Find hidden words in a letter grid. Drag to select words in any direction. Classic word search puzzle with multiple themed word sets.

🔍
word

Stroop Test

The classic Stroop effect test. Name the color of the text, not the word itself. Challenge your cognitive control and attention.

🎨
focus

Dual N-Back

Advanced working memory training. Track both position and letter simultaneously. The gold standard in cognitive training exercises.

🧠
focus

Simon Says

Classic memory pattern game. Watch the colored buttons light up, then repeat the sequence. How long can you remember?

🔴
memory

Mental Rotation

Test your spatial reasoning. Compare rotated shapes and determine if they match. Challenge your ability to mentally manipulate objects in 3D space.

🔄
visual

Logic Grid

Solve deductive reasoning puzzles. Use clues to fill in a logic grid and determine who has what. Test your logical thinking skills.

🧩
logic

Quick Math

Rapid true/false math judgments. Decide if equations are correct or incorrect. Test your mental math speed and accuracy under time pressure.

✓
math

2048

Play the addictive 2048 puzzle game. Merge tiles to reach 2048. Use arrow keys or swipe. Track your high score and challenge yourself.

🔢
logic

Wordle

Guess the 5-letter word in 6 tries. Green means correct position, orange means wrong position. A new word every game. Challenge your vocabulary.

🟩
word

Hangman

Guess the hidden word before the hangman is complete. 6 wrong guesses and it's game over. Each word comes with a hint. Classic word puzzle fun.

💀
word

15 Puzzle

Slide the numbered tiles to arrange them in order. Classic sliding puzzle game. Track your moves and time.

🧩
logic

Tic-Tac-Toe

Play Tic-Tac-Toe against the AI. X goes first. Can you beat the computer? Track your wins, losses, and draws.

⭕
logic

Connect Four

Classic Connect Four game. Drop colored discs and connect four in a row. Two players on the same device. Strategy meets fun.

🔴
logic

Tower of Hanoi

Move the entire stack of disks to another peg. Larger disks cannot go on smaller ones. 3-6 disk levels. Classic recursion puzzle.

🗼
logic

Spot Difference

Find the one emoji that's different from the rest. Grid gets larger as you progress. Test your visual perception and attention to detail.

🔍
visual

Pattern Lock

Memorize and reproduce dot patterns. Watch the pattern light up, then draw it from memory. Increasing difficulty. 3 lives per game.

🔐
memory

Crack the Code

Mastermind-style code breaking. Guess the 4-color code. Black pegs = correct color & position. White pegs = correct color, wrong position. 8 attempts.

🔓
logic

Trivia Quiz

Test your knowledge with 10 random trivia questions. Science, history, geography, and more. Build streaks for bonus points.

❓
knowledge

Ball Sort

Sort colored balls into matching tubes. Click a tube to pick up the top ball, click another to place it. Only same colors can stack. Relaxing puzzle.

🔮
casual

Maze Runner

Navigate through a randomly generated maze. Use arrow keys or swipe. Three sizes: 10×10, 15×15, 20×20. Race against the clock.

🏃
casual

Snake

Classic Snake game with beautiful visuals. Eat food to grow longer. Avoid walls and yourself. Three difficulty levels.

🐍
casual

Racing

Dodge traffic in this obstacle avoidance racing game. Speed increases over time. Three difficulty levels. Test your reflexes.

🏎️
coordination

Tank Battle

Top-down tank shooter. Destroy enemy tanks, survive waves. Destructible walls, particle effects. Three difficulty levels.

🚜
coordination

No games found. Try a different search or category.

Free online brain training games to test and improve your cognitive abilities. Measure your typing speed, reaction time, memory, and more.
